name: China Building Material Test & Certification Group Co., Ltd.
summary: China Building Material Test & Certification Group Co., Ltd. provides third-party test and certification services in the fields of building materials and construction engineering in China. The company offers inspection, certification, security, and instrument development services, as well as extended services. It serves building material production and circulation enterprises, construction engineering owners and contractors, solar photovoltaic production and application enterprises, carbon emission permits trade organizations, and government authorities, as well as consumers. The company is headquartered in Beijing, China.
